current_question: How character training works in LLMs — what training interventions actually instill values vs. surface behaviors — and how to evaluate model character rigorously (spec compliance evals, red-teaming, statistical methodology).
filter_outs: AI governance, policy-focused safety work, vague existential risk narratives without empirical grounding
freeform: Empirically-oriented alignment researcher at the intersection of mechanistic interpretability and character/values training. Anthropic-empirical style — care about statistical rigor (SEM, power analysis), OOD generalization of alignment training data, and what activations actually encode. Work closely with Neel Nanda and Samuel Marks.
